objective: Pin the read-only audit worktree to the exact green public authority commit.
preservation_rule: All read-set, required-output, forbidden-scope, acceptance and stop conditions from the original envelope remain active except that exact HEAD is the green authority commit and no upstream equality is required for the isolated local branch.
acceptance_commands: return read-only audit with no repository diff
rollback: Delete the clean local audit branch/worktree. No repository or external state is mutated.
